title: Example 6-4 size factor for a shouldered steel shaft

notes: This file follows Example 6-4 on p297-p298.
The problem statement ultimate strength is included as a given, even though Eqs. (6-20) and (6-21) do not use it directly.
For the nonrotating case, the solver fetches the solid-round relation from Table 6-3 and computes d_e = 0.370 d before applying Eq. (6-20).
